productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Off White Casual Handbag
description: Urban chic has a new extension of its style, with this handbag from lino perros. Style and practicality combine in this stylish handbag, which you can pair with casual and formal ensembles. Made of leatherette for durability and style Two short handles for carrying ease and style One main zippered compartment with mobile and organiser pouches. Two zippered compartments on the side One zippered compartment on the back Flap on the front with a shimmer finish Branded zippers Brand badge on the front Tassels hanging from the front handle for additional style Bag care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
